prompt.customInstructions: httpbin.org is an HTTP testbed — we use GET /json which returns a fixed JSON document, then synthesize PartResult[] entries from its fields. Exists purely to demonstrate the api mode runtime wiring.
prompt.knownIssues: httpbin returns the same payload for any /json request — result count will always be the same.
prompt.apiNotes: Endpoint used: GET /json → { slideshow: { title, slides: [...] } }. We map slides[] into PartResult[].
